evidence_strength: Limited - small PFAS sex-specific test set
performance_lens: Lowest PFAS-only test RMSE among 2 candidate strategy(s): RMSE=0.036, MAE=0.029, R2=0.999.
robustness_lens: Sex-specific, but PFAS test n=3; treat as provisional despite model train n=307.

recommendation: Best observed Human/F HLe_invivo strategy in this run, but collect or complete more sex-specific PFAS test data before relying on it operationally.
